title: selaginella × dualis
intro: Selaginella × dualis, also known as the resurrection plant, is a unique hybrid of two species of Selaginella plants that has the ability to survive in extreme conditions by entering a state of dormancy, allowing it to revive when water becomes available. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Selaginella × dualis include its ability to promote antioxidant activity, reduce oxidative stress, and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or used in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
